node.text: Gina combines her passion for dance and fashion to show creativity and share love with others.

node.text: Gina is passionate about fashion trends and unique pieces, and she blended her love for dance and fashion in starting the online store.

node.text: Dance is Gina's stress relief and fashion fuels her creativity.

node.text: Gina advises Jon to focus on the big goal, get support, and dance it out to stay motivated during tough times in business.
